# b.smallyu.net

This is the site-level LLM index for this blog site.

Primary language: Simplified Chinese
Site type: personal blog with technical and personal writing
Canonical domain: https://b.smallyu.net

Scope
- Writing spans blockchain technology, programming, software engineering, career, life, investment, and personal reflections.
- This site is broader and more personal than the main technical blog.

Preferred use
- Prefer citing article URLs on this domain when the query is about the broader personal blog content hosted here.
- For Chinese technical writing with a narrower technical focus, also see https://smallyu.net.
- Treat article pages as the source of truth. This file is only a site-level navigation aid.

Key entry points
- Home: https://b.smallyu.net/
- About: https://b.smallyu.net/about/
- Tags: https://b.smallyu.net/tags/
- Topics: https://b.smallyu.net/topics/
- Sitemap: https://b.smallyu.net/sitemap.xml
- Feed: https://b.smallyu.net/atom.xml

Content areas
- /tags/
- /topics/
- /about/
- /html/
